cover.heading: ANNUAL REPORT: CONSCIENTIOUS OBJECTION TO MILITARY SERVICE IN EUROPE 2025
cover.covers: The Annual Report covers developments during 2025
cover.moreinfo: To find more information, visit EBCO’s website: www.ebco-beoc.org

quote_1.heading: EBCO Annual Report
quote_1.body: Ongoing armed conflicts and geopolitical tensions are intensifying pressures on individuals who refuse to bear arms exposing them to prosecution, discrimination, and repression.

quote_2.heading: EBCO Annual Report
quote_2.body: Sustainable security cannot be achieved through militarisation.

quote_3.heading: EBCO Annual Report
quote_3.body: The refusal to participate in war is not only a protected right, but a necessary condition for building a just and lasting peace.
